vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: To me, wearing a watch is part and parcel of being a professional, as it demonstrates that you are mindful of other people's time.

vocab.meaning: duy trì mọi việc hoạt động trơn tru/đúng tiến độ
vocab.example: I rely on my wristwatch to keep things ticking over throughout the day, ensuring I don't fall behind on my hectic schedule.

vocab.meaning: có ích cho ai đó (trong tương lai/tình huống cụ thể)
vocab.example: The habit of wearing a watch will stand you in good stead during exams or interviews where mobile phones are strictly prohibited.

vocab.word: at the drop of a hat
vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức, không chút do dự
vocab.example: Having the time right on my wrist allows me to adjust my plans at the drop of a hat without having to fumble for my phone in a bag.

vocab.meaning: những vật dụng/kỹ năng cần thiết cho một công việc
vocab.example: For a pilot or a diver, a high-precision watch is one of the essential tools of the trade rather than just a simple accessory.
